Vendored, committed Elm source for the two UNPUBLISHED foundation packages the
docs app compiles against. Regenerate with `pnpm run build:vendor` (which runs
scripts/vendor-foundation.mjs) after changing either sibling, then commit.

  HtmlIr.*     <- jackhp95/elm-html-intermediate-representation (PRIVATE, not on
                 a package registry) src/HtmlIr/, version 1.0.0
  TypedHtml.*  <- jackhp95/elm-typed-html (PRIVATE, not on a package registry)
                 src/TypedHtml.elm + src/TypedHtml/, version 1.0.0
                 EXCLUDES TypedHtml/Review/* (elm-review rule facts that import
                 Cem.Facts, an elm-review-only module; unexposed + unimported).

Why vendored: docs import M3e.* (../src), which depends on HtmlIr.*, and the
Examples/Guide routes import TypedHtml.Attributes / TypedHtml.Aria. Netlify
clones only elm-m3e, so the old `../../elm-*/src` source-dirs were absent on CI.
This committed copy is a docs/elm.json source-directory (vendor/elm-foundation),
making `pnpm run build:ci` self-contained.
